name: Frankfurter Casserole (Hot Dog or Hotdog)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups All-beef frankfurters, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 cup Ready-mix biscuit mixture, prepared as package directs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix all ingredients except the biscuits in a large bowl.
3. Bring the mixture to a gentle boil for about 5 minutes.
4. Spoon about 3/4 cup of the mixture into each of 8 individual baking dishes.
5. Top each portion with a biscuit.
6. Bake until the biscuits are dark golden brown, about 20 minutes.
7. Serve immediately.
Note: Yield is approximately 1/2 oz per serving after shrinkage (serves 4).
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE + 1/2 HIGH-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
CAL: 150
